locations.name: 巴西
locations.summary: 巴西联邦共和国（葡萄牙語：República Federativa do Brasil），通稱巴西（Brasil），是南美洲國家，位於南美東部，東臨大西洋，人口2.15億，居世界第7。其國土大部分介于赤道和南回归线之间，面積851萬平方公…

locations.name: 圭亚那
locations.summary: 蓋亞那合作共和国（英語：Co-operative Republic of Guyana），通称圭亚那（英語：Guyana），位於南美洲北部，是南美洲一个以英語為官方語言的国家，也是英联邦成员國。東鄰蘇利南，南臨巴西，西鄰委内瑞拉，北鄰大西…

locations.name: 亞馬遜盆地
locations.summary: 亞馬遜盆地（葡萄牙語：Bacia do rio Amazonas），又稱亞馬遜平原，是南美洲的亞馬遜河及其支流所流經之處，盆地與平原地形兼具。 地理 南美洲的亞馬遜雨林（60%面積位於巴西）位於亞馬遜盆地，是全球最大的雨林，佔地6百萬平方…

locations.name: Rupununi savannah
locations.summary: The Rupununi savannah is a savanna plain in Guyana, in the Upper Takutu-Upper Essequibo region.

relations.subject: Hoary-throated spinetail
relations.evidence: The hoary-throated spinetail has a very restricted range in the extreme northern Amazon Basin

relations.subject: Hoary-throated spinetail
relations.evidence: It inhabits gallery forest along the watercourses, which flow through grasslands called "Lavrado" in Brazil and the Rupununi savannah in Guyana

relations.subject: Hoary-throated spinetail
relations.evidence: It is primarily threatened by habitat degradation and fires associated with small-scale agricultural operations. "About 60% of the gallery forest within the species' range is inside indigenous reserves" which are not formally protected, and rice is illegally farmed in them by non-indigenous people
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
